---
title: "Abel George Nibu"
subtitle: "BBA in International Business | Data Analytics | Business Intelligence"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 18em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-linkedin-profile
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Abel2436/
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: abel.georgenibu2@mail.dcu.ie
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-intro}
My name is Abel George Nibu and I am a graduate in Business Administration with a major in International Business as well as an emerging interest in data analytics, reporting and business intelligence. My educational and internship opportunities have enhanced my skills of relating business knowledge with data-driven decision-making.
:::

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}
## Welcome to my ePortfolio

This portfolio highlights my **academic background**, **professional experience**, **technical skills**, and **project work**. It reflects my journey from studying business fundamentals to applying analytical tools such as **Excel, Tableau, Power BI, and SQL** to real-world business problems.[^portfolio]
:::

## What I bring

| Area | Strengths |
|---|---|
| Business foundation | International business, financial management, managerial economics, accounting |
| Analytics tools | Excel, Tableau, Power BI, SQL |
| Practical exposure | Internships in financial services and project operations |
| Professional focus | Data analysis, business intelligence, reporting, and decision support |

## Professional profile

I like solving problems that involve business knowledge as well as problem analysis. I have gained confidence in my research of business problems, organizing, discovery of trends, and presentation of insights as part of my studies and during my internships.

### Current areas of growth

- [x] Business analysis and reporting
- [x] Data visualization
- [x] Professional communication
- [ ] Advanced Python-based analytics
- [ ] Portfolio projects with richer interactive outputs

::: {.callout-note}
## My goal

My goal is to build a career where I can combine **business knowledge**, **analytical thinking**, and **digital tools** to support smarter decisions and create measurable value for organizations.
:::

## Explore this site

You can use this portfolio to learn more about:

- my background and strengths on the **About** page
- my practical and academic work in **Projects**
- my qualifications through my **CV**
- my learning journey in the **Reflection** page
- my contact details and references on the **Contact / References** page

[^portfolio]: This site is built with **Quarto**, version controlled with **Git**, and intended for publication through **GitHub Pages**.
